spirits.name: Pyrax
spirits.description: A fierce pup with ember-hot fangs that singe anything it bites

spirits.name: Pyroph
spirits.description: A small moth with wings that flicker like candle flames

spirits.name: Pyrald
spirits.description: A small crustacean with a shell of smoldering volcanic rock

spirits.name: Pyriel
spirits.description: A gentle spirit that tends the warmth of home fires

spirits.name: Pyreph
spirits.description: A tiny lizard that moves so fast it appears to teleport

spirits.name: Pyroth
spirits.description: A bulky bear cub that constantly smolders with inner fire

spirits.name: Pyrux
spirits.description: A floating ember that feeds on ambient magical energy

spirits.name: Narax
spirits.description: An aggressive fish with razor-sharp fins and a nasty bite

spirits.name: Naroph
spirits.description: A translucent jellyfish that drifts on currents of magic

spirits.name: Narald
spirits.description: A clam-like creature with an impossibly hard pearlescent shell

spirits.name: Nariel
spirits.description: A graceful foal born from crystal-clear mountain streams

spirits.name: Nareph
spirits.description: A tiny eel that darts through water faster than the eye can track

spirits.name: Naroth
spirits.description: A rotund toad that can swallow prey twice its size

spirits.name: Narux
spirits.description: A bubble spirit that absorbs mana from the moisture in air

spirits.name: Terax
spirits.description: A tough canine with fangs of crystallized mineral

spirits.name: Teroph
spirits.description: A moth with wings of fine dust that shimmer with earth magic

spirits.name: Terald
spirits.description: A small golem packed from dense, enchanted clay

spirits.name: Teriel
spirits.description: A gentle fawn covered in soft, healing moss

spirits.name: Tereph
spirits.description: A small gecko that skitters across stone surfaces at blinding speed

spirits.name: Teroth
spirits.description: A living pile of enchanted mud with surprising resilience

spirits.name: Terux
spirits.description: A tiny spirit that resonates with the earth's ley lines

spirits.name: Aerax
spirits.description: A wild pup that rides the wind to ambush its prey

spirits.name: Aeroph
spirits.description: A tiny sylph that plays in summer breezes

spirits.name: Aerald
spirits.description: A hedgehog-like spirit that curls into an impenetrable windball

spirits.name: Aeriel
spirits.description: A playful deer born from gentle spring winds

spirits.name: Aereph
spirits.description: A hummingbird spirit that flits between moments

spirits.name: Aeroth
spirits.description: A hulking beast that breathes hurricane-force winds

spirits.name: Aerux
spirits.description: A mote of sentient air that hums with magical resonance

spirits.name: Fulax
spirits.description: A crackling pup whose bite carries a devastating electrical shock

spirits.name: Fuloph
spirits.description: A firefly that sparks with static electricity

spirits.name: Fulald
spirits.description: A compact armadillo-like spirit charged with defensive electricity

spirits.name: Fuliel
spirits.description: A young hart whose antlers pulse with protective static

spirits.name: Fuleph
spirits.description: A tiny weasel-like spirit that moves at the speed of electricity

spirits.name: Fuloth
spirits.description: A stout toad whose croaks produce rolling thunder

spirits.name: Fulux
spirits.description: A dancing spark that feeds on electromagnetic fields

spirits.name: Kryax
spirits.description: A wolf pup with fangs of solid ice that never melt

spirits.name: Kryoph
spirits.description: A tiny ice crystal spirit that exudes an aura of deep cold

spirits.name: Kryald
spirits.description: A compact ice crab with a shell of permafrost

spirits.name: Kryiel
spirits.description: A delicate fawn wreathed in shimmering rime frost

spirits.name: Kryeph
spirits.description: A tiny fox that slides across ice with effortless grace

spirits.name: Kryoth
spirits.description: A round, dense ball of compacted snow with surprising vitality

spirits.name: Kryux
spirits.description: A tiny ice sprite that draws mana from the cold itself

spirits.name: Solax
spirits.description: A radiant pup with fangs that shine like sunbeams

spirits.name: Soloph
spirits.description: A floating crystal that refracts light into magical energy

spirits.name: Solald
spirits.description: A tortoise with a shell that glows with morning light

spirits.name: Soliel
spirits.description: A fawn whose coat glints with protective starlight

spirits.name: Soleph
spirits.description: A tiny bird of light that appears and vanishes in flashes

spirits.name: Soloth
spirits.description: A stout bear cub that radiates warmth and morning light

spirits.name: Solux
spirits.description: A softly glowing orb that feeds on ambient light energy

spirits.name: Nyxax
spirits.description: A shadow pup that strikes from darkness without warning

spirits.name: Nyxoph
spirits.description: A mote of sentient darkness that whispers forbidden knowledge

spirits.name: Nyxald
spirits.description: A dense shadow creature with an impenetrable dark shell

spirits.name: Nyxiel
spirits.description: A fawn of twilight that feeds on fading light

spirits.name: Nyxeph
spirits.description: A shadow that moves independently, darting between dark spaces

spirits.name: Nyxoth
spirits.description: A hulking shadow bear that absorbs light around it

spirits.description: A tiny creature of night that feeds on ambient dark energy
